RichText.Text: 1. disruptive and challenging behaviour 2. make sense make sense of... 3. show increasingly advanced written and spoken language skills 4. succeed academically in all subjects 5. students' worse academic performance 6. have difficulty (in) managing a classroom 7. students' poor classroom performance 8. a vicious circle an unfavorable situation 9. the necessity of family education 10. the popularity of ... 11. ways to encourage students' positive behavior 12. the impact/influence/effect of ...... have an effect/influence/impact on...... 13. The adults are stressed and not in control of their feelings.

1. 具有破坏性和挑衅性的行为 2. 有意义，有道理，讲得通 理解…… 3. 展现出日益高级的书面和 口头语言能力 4. 在所有学科上取得学业成功 5. 学生较差的学业表现 6. 管理课堂有困难 7. 学生较差的课堂表现 8. 恶性的循环 不利的局面 9. 家庭教育的必要性 10. ……的普及／流行 11. 鼓励学生积极行为的方法 12. ……的影响 对……有影响 13. 成年人压力很大，无法控制自己的情绪。
